backend/main.mo: Main actor for the wedding invitation platform, defining data types (Invitation, Event, RSVP, Photo, Music) and CRUD operations with access control, blob storage mixins, and invite link management.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the invitationStore by adding optional bridePhoto and groomPhoto fields (as ExternalBlob) to each existing Invitation record.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated file paths, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for the wedding invitation SaaS platform.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each page, component, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Indian Wedding Invitation SaaS Platform' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for landing, dashboard, create wizard, editor, and guest invitation pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGuard.t: Empty file — AuthGuard component with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/RSVPRe: A modal component that displays RSVP responses and statistics (total responses, confirmed guests, declined) for a given invitation, fetching data via custom hooks and rendering a scrollable list of guest entries.
frontend/src/components/events/EventCard: A display card component for a single event that shows the event type icon, title, date, time, venue, and description, with edit and delete action buttons.
frontend/src/components/events/EventForm: A form component for creating or editing an event, allowing the user to select event type and fill in title, date, time, venue, and description fields with save and cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/guest/CountdownT: A live countdown timer component that calculates and displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until the wedding date, styled according to the invitation's template and background choice.
frontend/src/components/guest/CoupleIntr: A section component that introduces the couple by displaying their photos (or name initials as fallback) side by side with scroll-triggered fade-in animation, adapting styles for dark or light templates.
frontend/src/components/guest/EventTimel: A timeline/grid component that renders a list of wedding events (haldi, mehndi, sangeet, etc.) as individually styled cards with gradient headers, icons, and scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/guest/HeroSectio: Renders the full-screen hero section of a wedding invitation with a parallax background, optional couple photos, names, date, and venue. Accepts an Invitation object and derives display data from it.
frontend/src/components/guest/PhotoGalle: Displays a responsive photo grid with scroll-animation reveal and a fullscreen lightbox with prev/next navigation. Styles are driven by the selected wedding template.
frontend/src/components/guest/RSVPForm.t: Provides a styled RSVP form for wedding guests to submit attendance, guest count, and a message, with dark/light theme adaptation and a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/guest/VenueSecti: Renders the wedding venue name and address in a themed card with a map-pin icon, Google Maps link, and scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/guest/WhatsAppSh: A fixed floating button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp share link for the wedding invitation URL with the couple's names.
frontend/src/components/layout/Decorativ: Renders one of three decorative divider variants (mandala image, flourish image, or simple line) with an SVG fallback if images fail to load.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Fixed site header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation, scroll-aware transparency, and conditional hiding of the 'Create Invitation' CTA on editor and guest pages.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicContr: A fixed floating music player component that supports play/pause, mute, and volume control for a given audio URL, with autoplay support and an expandable controls panel.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicUploa: A form component for uploading audio files (MP3/WAV/M4A) as base64 data URLs, with inline play/pause preview and an autoplay toggle stored in the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/media/PhotoGalle: A drag-and-drop/click photo upload component that reads image files as base64 data URLs, displays them in a grid, and allows individual deletion via the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Reusable skeleton loading component supporting four variants (card, text, image, invitation-card) with configurable item count for loading state UI.
frontend/src/components/templates/ColorS: A grid picker component that displays available color schemes as swatch buttons and updates the selected color scheme in the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/templates/FontSe: Defines a list of heading/body font pairings grouped by category (Classic, Modern, Romantic, Bold) and renders a grouped selector UI for choosing a font combination.
frontend/src/components/templates/Templa: Renders a live styled preview card of the wedding invitation using the current form data, resolving the selected template, color scheme, font, and background to display names, date, and venue.
Displays available invitation templates grouped by category in a grid, allowing the user to select one with a visual selected indicator and a 'NEW' badge for new templates.
frontend/src/components/wizard/CoupleDet: A wizard step component that collects couple details including bride/groom names, wedding date/time, venue info, and optional photo uploads for both bride and groom.
frontend/src/components/wizard/EventMana: A wizard step component for managing wedding events (add, edit, delete) using EventCard and EventForm components, displaying events sorted by date.
frontend/src/components/wizard/MediaMana: A wizard step component that provides photo gallery upload and background music upload sections using PhotoGalleryUpload and MusicUploader components.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ProgressB: A progress bar component that visually displays wizard steps with completed, active, and pending states connected by an animated gold line.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ReviewSte: A wizard review step that summarizes all form data (couple details, events, template, media) and collects a URL slug before final submission.
frontend/src/components/wizard/TemplateT: A wizard step for selecting and customizing invitation templates, color schemes, fonts, and background styles, with support for saving and applying named theme variants.
frontend/src/context/InvitationFormConte: React context provider that manages global form state for the invitation wizard, including couple details, events, template/theme settings, and media, with CRUD helpers for events.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations including invitations, events, RSVPs, photos, music, themes, and blobs, wrapping the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Provides two hooks—useScrollAnimation for triggering visibility state when an element enters the viewport, and useLazyLoad for lazy-loading images via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a gold/crimson/ivory/charcoal design system with light and dark mode tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitationWizar: Multi-step wizard page for creating a wedding invitation, sequentially collecting couple details, events, theme, media, and review, then submitting all data to the backend via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that lists all user invitations with actions to create, publish, delete, copy link, and view RSVP responses, using React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/pages/GuestInvitation.tsx: Renders the public-facing wedding invitation page for guests, fetching invitation data, events, photos, and music by URL slug, and composing all guest-facing sections (hero, countdown, couple intro, events, gallery, venue, RSVP, music).
frontend/src/pages/InvitationEditor.tsx: Provides a tabbed editor UI for updating an existing wedding invitation, handling form initialization from backend data, couple photo uploads, and saving changes via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with a parallax hero section, feature highlights, and a call-to-action button that navigates users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: 404 error page displaying a decorative message and navigation buttons to return home or go to the dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/animations.ts: Exports animation duration constants, easing curves, preset animation configs, and helper functions for stagger delays and scroll-based CSS transition styles.
frontend/src/utils/eventIcons.tsx: Maps each wedding EventType (haldi, mehndi, sangeet, wedding, reception, custom) to a configuration object containing icon, colors, gradients, and label for consistent UI rendering.
frontend/src/utils/templateDefinitions.t: Defines the TemplateDefinition interface and exports an array of all available invitation templates with their color schemes, fonts, gradients, and metadata across categories like Royal Indian, Modern Minimal, Cinematic Dark, and Romantic.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, and an extended theme with a wedding luxury color palette (gold, crimson, ivory, charcoal), custom fonts, border radii, and box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a wedding invitation app, its current version, known UI bugs (hidden publish controls, overlapping CTA text, missing events on edit), and existing feature implementations.
